package rulecoverage

func NegativeMigrationTestsLiveUnderHandlerPackages() string {
    ruleID := "migration_tests_live_under_handler_packages"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Migration-specific tests located in transport packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
